description.value:
Trigger Your Strike hits a creature you’ve designated as your mark and deals damage.

The target becomes your choice of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard], or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Suppressed] until the end of your next turn. That creature becomes immune to Overwhelming Strike until the end of your next turn.
